name_th: สถานะความครบถ้วนของรายการอาวุธ
description: Complete catalogue import from the referenced Weapons page. Field-level details remain partial where the source list does not state them.
notes: All entries listed on the referenced Weapons page are present. A null field means the source page used for this import did not verify that value.

name_th: สถานะความครบถ้วนของรายการเกราะ
description: Complete catalogue import from the referenced Armor page. Field-level details remain partial where the source list does not state them.
notes: All entries listed on the referenced Armor page are present. A null field means the source page used for this import did not verify that value.

name_th: สถานะความครบถ้วนของรายการเครื่องประดับ
description: Complete catalogue import from the accessory section of the referenced Armor page. Field-level details remain partial where the source list does not state them.
notes: All entries listed in the accessory section of the referenced Armor page are present. A null field means the source page used for this import did not verify that value.

name_th: สถานะความครบถ้วนของเวทมนตร์
description: Complete import of entries listed on the referenced Spells page.
included_scope: All entries listed on the Spells page
notes: A null field was not verified by the referenced source page.

name_th: สถานะความครบถ้วนของบอส
description: Imported story and Ruins boss names documented by the referenced page; detailed combat data is not supplied by that page.
included_scope: Ruins where the Devil Sleeps bosses
Infinite Abyss of Dreams boss recurrence
unimported_scope: Boss statistics and skill details not documented by the source page
notes: Names, stated locations, drops, and strategy notes were imported only where the source verifies them.

name_th: สถานะความครบถ้วนของภารกิจ
description: Complete import of the Starting and Normal Mission tables documented by the referenced page.
notes: The page is marked as a community stub; this status is complete only for the mission entries currently documented on that page.

name_th: สถานะความครบถ้วนของวัสดุ
description: Complete import of entries listed on the referenced Crafting Materials page.
included_scope: All entries listed on the Crafting Materials page
notes: Material category and obtain method are set only when explicitly stated in the referenced list; Alcohol retains null values because the list supplies no details.

name_th: สถานะความครบถ้วนของมอนสเตอร์
description: Only creatures cross-referenced from imported maps and category pages are present.
notes: No creature statistic or drop is inferred from map presence.

name_th: สถานะความครบถ้วนของแผนที่
description: Five verified overworld maps are present; the map catalogue is not yet complete.
unimported_scope: Remaining biomes, dungeons, and special areas
notes: Each imported map retains its page-level source URL.

name_th: สถานะความครบถ้วนของไอเท็ม
description: The generic items dataset is intentionally empty until entries can be sourced without duplicating specialized datasets.
unimported_scope: Generic non-food, non-equipment, non-material item catalogue
notes: The dataset stays empty rather than adding unverified or duplicate records.
